CLAUSE.NAME: Collection_LetterToDrawee_SpecialInstructions
CLAUSE.value: • Documents to be delivered against payment. • These documents will be at your disposal against receipt of your acceptance of the enclosed draft. • In case of non payment the draft will have to be protested • In case of non payment the draft will not have to be protested. • These documents will be at your disposal against receipt of your irrevocable written undertaking to pay at maturity. • These documents will be at your disposal against receipt of your duly accepted draft and your instructions to us to add our aval thereto. • We are authorized to deliver the enclosed documents free of payment.
